name: ASUS TUF GAMING B650M-PLUS WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING B650M-PLUS WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5
description: Micro-ATX B650M gaming motherboard for AMD AM5 socket with DDR5 support and WiFi 6.
